chunks.title: Korah's Rebellion Begins
chunks.reason: Describes the gathering of rebels and their initial challenge to Moses and Aaron.

chunks.title: Moses's Response to Korah
chunks.reason: Moses falls in prayer and delivers a speech challenging the rebels to a test of holiness.

chunks.title: Dathan and Abiram Refuse
chunks.reason: Moses summons the Reubenites who reply with a sharp refusal and complaint.

chunks.title: The Test of Censers
chunks.reason: Moses sets the terms for the test and Yahweh appears to confirm the confrontation.

chunks.title: Judgment on the Rebels
chunks.reason: Moses predicts the judgment and the earth swallows the rebels while fire consumes the 250 men.

chunks.title: Instructions for the Censers
chunks.reason: Yahweh gives specific instructions to Eleazar regarding the bronze censers as a memorial.

chunks.title: The Plague and Aaron's Atonement
chunks.reason: The congregation grumbles again, a plague starts, and Aaron stops it with incense.
